metadata.name: Respond to Medical Emergency in the Stands

description: A fan in the stands suffers a medical emergency. The venue's emergency response team must be dispatched.

nodes.task_description: Receive an alert from an usher about a medical emergency, including the fan's location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets the location of the emergency.

nodes.task_description: Immediately dispatch the on-site paramedic team to the fan's location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends the paramedics to the correct location.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch security to clear a path for the paramedics and ensure their privacy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends security staff to assist.

nodes.task_description: Log the incident in the event management system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a detailed log of the response.
